summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of FLOWTOX_REGIME_01 quantitative futures trading strategy backtesting system. All backend APIs and frontend UI components tested successfully. Strategy correctly implements the spec and intentionally fails acceptance criteria (Sharpe < 1) as expected per 'honest results' philosophy.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/instruments returns ES instrument with correct metadata
Backend: GET /api/strategy/info returns strategy metadata, param space, and acceptance criteria
Backend: POST /api/backtest/single executes successfully with all required fields (metrics, checks, model_info, charts, trades)
Backend: GET /api/runs/{run_id} retrieves stored run payload
Backend: GET /api/runs/{run_id}/download/{kind} returns downloadable files for metrics, trades, and equity
Backend: POST /api/optimize/start initiates optimization job and returns job_id
Backend: GET /api/optimize/status/{job_id} polls successfully and completes in ~195s with best_params, walk_forward_sharpe, and sensitivity grid
Frontend: Page loads with all UI elements (Run Panel, tabs, controls)
Frontend: Run Panel renders with instrument select, tau1/tau2/N sliders, regime-exit switch, and action buttons
Frontend: Parameter sliders and inputs work correctly (tau1, tau2, max_hold_bars)
Frontend: Regime exit switch toggles correctly
Frontend: Reset button restores default parameters
Frontend: Run Single Backtest button executes and populates Overview tab with Acceptance Scorecard (FAIL chips as expected), Metrics grid, Cost Attribution, and Equity Curve
Frontend: Charts tab renders all 6 charts (Equity Curve, Drawdown, Monthly Returns, P&L Histogram, HMM Regime Posteriors, Volatility Regime)
Frontend: Trades tab renders trade log table with 1897 trades, search input, direction filter, and CSV download button
Frontend: Model tab displays HAR-RV parameters, GMM regime weights, and run configuration
Frontend: All tab navigation works correctly (Overview, Charts, Trades, Model)
Integration: Single backtest completes with correct data flow from backend to frontend
Integration: Walk-forward optimization backend endpoints work correctly (tested via API)
Integration: Progress console displays events and progress percentage
Acceptance: Strategy correctly fails acceptance criteria (Sharpe -0.84, Win Rate 39%) as expected per spec
